name: remote: Write access to repository not granted. #46398 - GitHub
snippet: If I am the owner of the repo, why do I not have write access? I created a fine-grained token for this repo but still, nothing.

snippet: Your best way is to import the code to github and finalize the project, like backend functions and DB, using Claude or Gemini. Run git push ...

name: Z.AI / GLM integration fails: Access token missing required scope
snippet: Standard Z.AI API keys do not include this scope. A possible fix would be to use direct API calls for Z.AI instead of minting agent keys. Proposed Fix (optional).

name: Push a model using GitHub Actions - Replicate
snippet: Go to your GitHub repository, click “Settings”, click “Secrets”, click “New repository secret”, and add your token as the secret. Name it ...
